purpose: Formal correspondence between an institution and external parties, such as citizens, organizations, or other institutions.
typical_use_cases: Responding to citizen inquiries or complaints
selection_hints: The addressee is external to the institution
The request mentions 'official letter' or similar wording
The communication needs a formal greeting, body, and closing with signature

header.purpose: Identify the issuing institution (name, logo, address, and contact details).

reference_info.purpose: Provide reference numbers, previous correspondence references, or file identifiers.

date.purpose: Record the date of the letter in the institutional format.

recipient_details.purpose: Specify recipient name, role, and address or contact details.

subject_line.purpose: State the subject of the letter concisely.

opening.purpose: Provide formal greeting and short introduction to the context.

main_body.purpose: Present the core message, reasoning, and any decisions or requests.

closing.purpose: Provide a formal closing sentence and polite sign‑off.

attachments_note.purpose: List attachments or enclosures referenced in the letter.

copy_recipients.purpose: Indicate any additional recipients (CC) of the letter.

signature_block.purpose: Provide the name, title, and space for signature of the authorized person.

planner_notes: Use this format when the user or router indicates a need for a formal institutional letter to an external recipient. Ensure that the plan includes clear subject, structured body, and appropriate closing, but do not generate final wording here.
